scope: Restoring a selected brigade's pre-battle draft from the saved StandingOrderTemplate
Desktop QA only; mobile/cellphone is outside the current target
flow: Sketched 森林左翼線 to X50 Y42 / X24 Y46 and clicked 戦線方針保存.
Verified two StandingOrderTemplates in localStorage for left-flank defenders.
Reloaded to campaign map, then Camp -> Deployment.
Verified 保存方針比較 panel for 第1戦列歩兵大隊 with 現在ドラフト and 保存済み標準 columns.
Verified 保存済み自律方針 list shows two rows and 比較 buttons.
Changed the selected draft to 弾性防御, confirming diff labels 姿勢 / 弾薬方針 / 後退線 and enabled 保存方針へ戻す.
Clicked 保存方針へ戻す and confirmed diff returned to なし and the button disabled again.
observations: Saved templates carried the frontline-plan description: 森林左翼線で戦闘中に保存した戦線方針。基準X50 Y42 / 後退X24 Y46。次回主戦場の初期配置へ適用する。

Deployment comparison displays the saved order after sector deployment-limit alignment, so chip coordinates may differ from the original battle sketch while the description preserves the original sketch coordinates.
Restore is a draft-level operation. The existing 方針保存 button remains the explicit action for persisting a changed draft.
notes: Mobile QA was skipped because the current target excludes cellphone/mobile.
